function.name: burgers_1d_check_converge_cfl
function.description: Conduct a 1D Burgers PDE simulation and evaluate its CFL convergence by halving CFL. It returns {"RMSE": float, "is_converged": bool, "accumulated_cost": int, "The cost of the solver simulating the environment": int, "The cost of the solver verifying convergence (This will not be included in your accumulated_cost)": int, "metrics1": object, "metrics2": object}.

n_space.description: Number of grid cells for spatial discretization
